'''Boztrok''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] on the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]] just outside [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]].

==History==
It was dominated by [[Gangster/Legends|gangsters]] and had a [[Shrine of Kooroo]]. The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Zo'Tannath]] frequented the planet.<ref name="psg">''[[Platt's Smugglers Guide]]''</ref> The [[Karazak/Legends|Karazak]] Slave Master [[Greezim Trentacal]] started his career in the betting pits on Boztrok.

{{Planet-stub}}
